rationale: The citing paper is an editorial content-coding review of 401 JMR articles from 2013–2019, and its stated prior-work anchors are historical journal reviews (e.g., Huber et al. 2014), not this specific study. The cited paper is a single 2020 empirical article on car design/brand equity, and the matched evidence is only one DOI reference with no contextual quotation indicating methodological or theoretical use. This looks most consistent with an incidental/example citation rather than a substantive dependency.
